description: 엔딩 에필로그 생성 프롬프트 — 플레이 기록 기반 LLM 에필로그 생성

body: Write a compelling epilogue (3-5 paragraphs) that concludes this player's unique journey.
Reference specific events, choices, and NPC relationships from the play summary.
The tone and outcome MUST match the ending type directive.
Mention what happened to key NPCs based on the relationship data.
If quests were forgotten (lost), reflect the consequences in the narrative.
End with a memorable final line that resonates with the player's journey.
